name: Trivium
description: 12HP analog voice core with state-variable filter, VCA, ADSR, AD/AR envelopes, routing switches, and a sidechainable pre/post path for clean voices or driven percussion.

controls.name: ADSR Attack
controls.description: Sets the attack time for the ADSR envelope.

controls.name: ADSR Decay
controls.description: Sets the decay time for the ADSR envelope.

controls.name: ADSR Sustain
controls.description: Sets the sustain level for the ADSR envelope.

controls.name: ADSR Release
controls.description: Sets the release time for the ADSR envelope.

controls.name: AD/AR Attack
controls.description: Sets the attack time for the AD/AR envelope.

controls.name: AD/AR Decay/Release
controls.description: Sets the decay or release time for the AD/AR envelope.

controls.name: AD/AR mode button
controls.description: Selects whether the second envelope behaves as decay or release.

controls.name: Resonance
controls.description: Sets filter resonance and the edge of self-oscillation.

controls.name: Filter Env
controls.description: Attenuverts the selected envelope before it reaches the filter.
controls.detail: center: zero · CW: positive · CCW: inverted

controls.name: Pre/Post switch
controls.description: Chooses whether the VCA sits before or after the filter.

controls.name: VCA source switch
controls.description: Selects which control source opens the VCA.

controls.name: Filter source switch
controls.description: Selects which envelope modulates the filter.

controls.name: Filter type switch
controls.description: Selects the filter response taken from the state-variable core.
controls.detail: Low Pass · Band Pass · High Pass

inputs.name: Audio In
inputs.description: AC-coupled audio input to the routing section.

inputs.name: ADSR Decay CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over ADSR decay time.

inputs.name: ADSR Release CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over ADSR release time.

inputs.name: AD/AR Attack CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over AD/AR attack time.

inputs.name: AD/AR Decay/Release CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over AD/AR decay or release time.

inputs.name: VCA Env CV
inputs.description: Scales the selected VCA control source.

behaviors.name: Two envelopes
behaviors.description: The gate triggers both envelopes, and each envelope is also available as a standalone front-panel output.

behaviors.name: Pre/Post routing
behaviors.description: Pre places the VCA before the filter so the filter can saturate. Post puts the filter before the VCA and lets the output stage add gain.

behaviors.name: VCA source selection
behaviors.description: The VCA can follow the ADSR envelope, the AD/AR envelope, or stay held open.

behaviors.name: Filter modulation selection
behaviors.description: The filter can follow either envelope, with the attenuverter deciding whether the move is positive or inverted.

behaviors.name: State-variable response
behaviors.description: Low-pass, band-pass, and high-pass responses are available from the same core, with self-oscillation strongest in low-pass mode.

behaviors.name: Percussive AD/AR shape
behaviors.description: The second envelope switches between decay and release behavior, with a slightly convex attack that suits pinged percussion.

patchIdeas.name: Complete voice
patchIdeas.patch: Audio source into Audio In · Gate opens the envelopes · ADSR drives the VCA · ADSR also sweeps the filter in Post mode · a compact one-module voice.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Trivium:
* Pre/Post switch: Post
* VCA source switch: ADSR
* Filter source switch: ADSR
* Filter type switch: Low Pass

VCO:
Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Trivium (Cutoff CV)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Trivium (Gate)
- VCO (Out) -> Trivium (Audio In)
- Trivium (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Pinged percussion
patchIdeas.patch: AD/AR mode selected · high resonance · short attack and decay · the filter rings like a struck body and the VCA follows the same percussive contour.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Trivium:
* Pre/Post switch: Pre
* VCA source switch: AD/AR
* Filter source switch: AD/AR
* Filter type switch: Band Pass

Trigger:
Output:

- Trigger (Out) g> Trivium (Gate)
- Trivium (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-oscillating lead
patchIdeas.patch: No audio input · resonance pushed up · cutoff tracks pitch CV · hold the VCA open and use the filter as a playable oscillator.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Trivium:
* Pre/Post switch: Post
* VCA source switch: HOLD
* Filter source switch: ADSR
* Filter type switch: Low Pass
* Resonance: high

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Trivium (Cutoff CV)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Trivium (Gate)
- Trivium (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Pre-drive distortion
patchIdeas.patch: Pre mode lets the VCA overdrive the filter input before the filter stage · a kick or bass line gets a harder edge and a rounder resonant peak.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Trivium:
* Pre/Post switch: Pre
* VCA source switch: ADSR
* Filter source switch: ADSR
* Filter type switch: High Pass

Bass VCO:
Envelope:
Output:

- Bass VCO (Out) -> Trivium (Audio In)
- Envelope (Out) >> Trivium (VCA Env CV)
- Envelope (Out) >> Trivium (Cutoff CV)
- Trivium (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Envelope router
patchIdeas.patch: Use the ADSR and AD/AR outputs as two independent modulation sources · one can shape another filter while the other drives a VCA or delay feedback path.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Trivium:
* Filter source switch: ADSR
* VCA source switch: AD/AR

Filter:
VCA:
Delay:
Clock:

- Clock (Out) g> Trivium (Gate)
- Trivium (ADSR Env Out) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Trivium (AD/AR Env Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Delay (In)
